message:
test(ft-xbnl0.2.4): oneshot_recv_with_cx observes pre-cancel (tick 419)

Pins cx-cancel observation on `oneshot_recv_with_cx`. With a still-alive
sender (no disconnect) and a pre-cancelled cx, the receive must return
Err promptly rather than blocking waiting for a send that will never
arrive.

Test shape:
- Create `(tx, rx)` oneshot channel; keep `_tx` alive (no disconnect)
- Pre-cancel a cx via `cx.cancel_with(User, ...)`
- Wrap `oneshot_recv_with_cx(&cx, rx)` in a 2 s outer safety-net timeout
  (via timeout_with_cx under a separate live cx) so a non-observing
  primitive would block until the outer fires, making the failure loud
- Assert elapsed < 1 s AND Err returned

Observed locally: test returns in under 10 ms — the asupersync oneshot
receiver honours cx-cancel directly.

Primitive × signal-kind matrix now:

| Primitive               | Budget deadline | Direct cancel    |
|-------------------------|-----------------|------------------|
| sleep_with_cx           | ✓ tick 382      | ✗ documented     |
| timeout_with_cx         | ✓ tick 383      | ✗ documented     |
| yield_now_with_cx       | (n/a)           | ✓ tick 418       |
| oneshot_recv_with_cx    | (transitive)    | ✓ tick 419       |

Check script Run 6/6 filter extends from
`_with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx` to also include
`oneshot_recv_with_cx`. Test counts per run:

  1/6 HTTP client       : 34
  2/6 TLS               : 45
  3/6 Regression guards :  3
  4/6 Metrics server    :  3
  5/6 Web server        :  2
  6/6 runtime_compat    :  5  (+1 from tick 419)
  total                 : 92

Full check script passes locally via fork bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,11 +15,11 @@
 #   4. Metrics server cx-first family (3) — metrics_server_start_with_cx_*
 #      Pre-cancel / mid-flight-cancel / happy path.
 #   5. Web server cx pre-cancel (1) — web_server_with_cx_*
-#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (4) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
-#      + yield_now_with_cx
+#   6. runtime_compat primitive contracts (5) — _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline
+#      + yield_now_with_cx + oneshot_recv_with_cx
 #      sleep_with_cx + timeout_with_cx budget-observation tests (ticks
 #      382/383), yield_now_with_cx cancel-checkpoint + happy-path tests
-#      (tick 418).
+#      (tick 418), oneshot_recv_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 419).
 #
 # Exit code 0 on all passing; non-zero on any failure.
 #
@@ -123,7 +123,7 @@ run_test "Run 6/6: runtime_compat primitive contracts (budget + cancel observati
     -p frankenterm-core \
     --features asupersync-runtime \
     --lib \
-    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx
+    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx
 
 echo
 echo "=============================================================="
